summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM Quote History System and Scenario Pricing. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all required features working perfectly. Frontend has navigation and VIN lookup service issues but core functionality is accessible via API.

ui_bugs.issue: VIN search functionality not working - clicking search button doesn't navigate to calculator or show results
Session management issues - admin pages redirect back to login page
Calculator Admin page not accessible through frontend navigation

integration_issues.issue: VIN lookup service not integrating with frontend - API works but UI doesn't trigger navigation
Frontend session management not maintaining login state for admin pages

passed_tests: Homepage Load - Page loads correctly with VIN search input
Admin Login - Login form works and authenticates successfully
Quote History API (200) - Found 2 quotes for test VIN with scenario pricing
Calculator API (201) - Monetization flow working (visible: $22489, internal: $23889)
Quote Creation API (201) - Quote created with scenario pricing (ID: 69c6d47d2d9da74e94eaa313)
Scenario Change API (200) - Successfully changed quote scenario to aggressive
Backend Auth (201) - JWT authentication working with admin@crm.com
Calculator Ports (200) - 4 ports and 4 vehicle types available
Calculator Calculate (201) - Hidden margin system working ($1400 margin)
Quote Scenario Management - All three scenarios (minimum, recommended, aggressive) functional
Quote Audit History - History tracking with scenario changes working
Lead Creation APIs - Quick lead and lead from quote creation working
Calculator Admin APIs - Profile, stats, routes, auction fees all functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend VIN lookup service integration and admin dashboard session management. VIN search should navigate to calculator page and admin navigation should maintain authentication state. Backend Quote History System is fully functional.

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (basic UI loads but navigation and VIN lookup issues)
